speaker: rep
text: Hi Lisa, thanks for joining the demo today. I know your team has been evaluating tools for pipeline management.

speaker: prospect
text: Yeah, we're looking at a few options. Excited to see what you've got.

speaker: rep
text: Great. Let me jump right into the platform. So first, here's the main dashboard. You can see the pipeline overview with deal stages, revenue forecasts, and activity metrics all in one view.

speaker: rep
text: And then over here we have the analytics module which gives you real-time reporting on rep performance, conversion rates by stage, and win/loss analysis with customizable date ranges.

speaker: rep
text: The integration layer connects with your CRM automatically. We support Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, and custom REST APIs. Data syncs bi-directionally every 15 minutes.

speaker: rep
text: Plus there's the AI forecasting engine that uses historical deal data to predict close probabilities. It factors in deal velocity, stakeholder engagement, and competitive signals.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay, that's a lot of features. Can we slow down? I'm most interested in the forecasting piece.

speaker: rep
text: Sure, absolutely. So the forecasting engine uses a proprietary model trained on millions of B2B deals. It assigns each deal a confidence score from 0 to 100.

speaker: rep
text: The model looks at email engagement, meeting frequency, champion activity, and deal stage duration. If a deal stalls for more than 14 days, it flags it as at-risk.

speaker: rep
text: We also have a coaching layer built on top that suggests next best actions for reps. Like if a deal hasn't had executive engagement, it'll recommend scheduling an exec briefing.

speaker: prospect
text: That sounds useful. How accurate is the forecasting compared to what reps self-report?

speaker: rep
text: Our customers typically see forecast accuracy improve from about 60% to 85% within two quarters. The AI removes the optimism bias that reps naturally have.

speaker: prospect
text: Impressive. We're currently using Clari for forecasting. How do you compare?

speaker: rep
text: Yeah so, um, like, our platform is, you know, sort of more comprehensive because we combine the forecasting with the full pipeline management and coaching capabilities all in one tool.

speaker: prospect
text: But specifically on forecasting accuracy, how does your model stack up against Clari's?

speaker: rep
text: Good question. Our model updates in real-time whereas most solutions batch-process overnight. That means your forecast reflects today's reality, not yesterday's.

speaker: prospect
text: What about implementation? Our team is stretched thin right now.

speaker: rep
text: Implementation typically takes 2-3 weeks. We handle the CRM integration, data migration, and initial model training. Your team just needs to provide CRM access and attend a 1-hour training session.

speaker: prospect
text: That's reasonable. What does pricing look like for a team of 25 reps?

speaker: rep
text: So for 25 seats on our growth plan it's $129 per seat monthly and then there's the enterprise plan at $199 which includes the AI coaching module and advanced analytics and custom integrations and priority support and we also have add-ons for territory planning and quota management.

speaker: prospect
text: Just the growth plan pricing is fine for now. Can we get a trial?

speaker: rep
text: We offer a 14-day free trial with full feature access. I can set that up for you today.

speaker: prospect
text: That would be great. Let me loop in my VP of Sales for the trial.

speaker: rep
text: Perfect. I'll send over the trial setup details and a calendar invite for a check-in next week. Does Wednesday work?

speaker: prospect
text: Wednesday afternoon works. Thanks for the walkthrough.
